define i32 @simplify_slt_smax_val(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define i32 @simplify_slt_smax_val
; CHECK-SAME: (i32 [[A:%.*]], i32 [[B:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:  start:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP:%.*]] = icmp slt i32 [[A]], [[B]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[CMP]], label [[THEN:%.*]], label [[ELSE:%.*]]
; CHECK:       then:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add nsw i32 [[A]], 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[B]]
; CHECK:       else:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 -1
start:
  %cmp = icmp slt i32 %a, %b
  br i1 %cmp, label %then, label %else

then:                                             ; preds = %start
  %add = add nsw i32 %a, 1
  %max = call i32 @llvm.smax.i32(i32 %b, i32 %add)
  ret i32 %max

else:                                             ; preds = %start
  ret i32 -1
}

issue.title: Missing optimization: fold `max(b, a + 1)` to `b` when `a < b`
issue.author: XChy

comments.author: nikic
comments.body: I don't think the subtraction is really relevant here. We can optimize the max away regardless of how it is used: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/V82mt-
